content.claim: Entrance examinations to upper-secondary schools are centrally organized and admission occurs via centralized application process managed by the Ministry, prioritizing primary school grades and entrance exams
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Describes administrative mechanism, not its equity or efficiency outcomes
Would persist regardless of 6/8-year track policy decisions
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
